name: Druidcraft
description: Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create one of the following effects within range. Weather: instantly forecast the next 24 hours of local weather. Bloom: make a flower blossom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom. Sensory Effect: create a harmless sensory effect that predicts seasonal weather (falling leaves, a light breeze, …). Fire Snuff: instantly light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire.
